summary: Export Hardening Pass testing completed. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Verified: max date range validation (90 days), audit logging for export.generated events, summary endpoint config flags (max_date_range_days, pdf_enabled), and rate limiter configuration (skipped in dev/test mode).

max_date_range_validation.90_days_succeeds: Date range of exactly 90 days returns 200 OK
max_date_range_validation.91_days_fails: Date range of 91 days returns 400 with error message, max_days=90, requested_days=91
max_date_range_validation.120_days_fails: Date range of 120 days returns 400 with error message

audit_logging.event_type: export.generated event created after CSV export
audit_logging.spend_activity_logged: Spend activity exports create audit events
audit_logging.audit_events_logged: Audit events exports create audit events

summary_config_flags.pdf_enabled: Returns config.pdf_enabled = false (feature flag for future PDF statements)

rate_limiting.configured: exportRateLimiter: 10 requests per 5 minutes per org
rate_limiting.skipped_in_dev_test: Rate limiter skips in dev/test mode (all 15 test requests succeeded)

critical_code_review_comments: Export routes properly implement max date range validation (90 days) via validateDateRange function
Audit logging implemented via logExportAuditEvent function - logs to auditEvent table with event_type='export.generated'
Rate limiter configured in /middleware/rate-limit.js with skip for dev/test mode
PDF statement service is code-only prep (no routes exposed yet) - pdf_enabled=false
Frontend ExportsPage shows date range warning when > 90 days selected and disables export button
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test org.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export hardening features fully tested. Max date range validation (90 days) working on all 3 export endpoints. Audit logging creates export.generated events with report_type, record_count, filters, user info. Summary endpoint returns config.max_date_range_days=90 and config.pdf_enabled=false. Rate limiter configured but skipped in dev/test mode. PDF statement service is code-only prep with no routes exposed yet.
